title: stelis levicula
intro: Stelis levicula, also known as the "Slender Stelis," is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis levicula include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used for centuries in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
